name: 马球场
era_style: 明代晚期江南官宦府邸马球场
description: 开阔的户外马球场地，周围柳池栏杆环绕，设有观众席扶手和看台。地面平坦草坪适合骑马奔驰，旁置葡萄果盘与马球杆，背景可见府邸建筑与树木，空间自由明亮，体现贵族娱乐休闲。
visual_reference: Expansive outdoor polo field on a late Ming dynasty Jiangnan official estate, willow-lined pond railings, spectator stands with armrests, flat grassy turf for horseback play, fruit platter tables nearby, distant mansion buildings and trees, bright sunny daylight, aristocratic leisure setting, highly detailed
lighting: 强烈自然日光照射整个场地，晴朗开阔
emotional_range: 目睹宠溺场景的嫉妒到脚伤后疏离冷眼对峙
